channel.title: Svg on jmpargana
channel.description: Recent content in Svg on jmpargana

item.title: SVG: `viewBox`
item.description:
In this post, I’ll explore the viewBox attribute in the <svg> HTML tag. I’ll use examples from the MDN documentation, applied to SVGs on this website’s home page.

Introduction

Before starting, it’s worth noting that SVGs are an extremely rich feature deserving extensive reading. The MDN documentation does an incredible job providing both Tutorials and Guides covering all attributes and features you’ll need to create and use SVGs.

With that said, we can move on into how to display it.
